HomeDestinationsMirik
West Bengal

Mirik

The Valley of the Lake

Mirror-still lake reflecting snow-capped peaks, the hush of water lapping against wooden boats.

4.5
(310 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Mirik is a picturesque hill station centered around the beautiful Sumendu Lake, surrounded by tea gardens and orange orchards.

History

Developed as a tourist destination in the 1970s, Mirik is now a popular spot for boating and tea tourism.

Altitude

1,495 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Sumendu Lake

A beautiful man-made lake with a walking path.

Religious

Bokar Monastery

A serene Buddhist monastery overlooking the valley.

KuboVista

Orange Orchards

Walk through fragrant orange groves.

Why visit: Seasonal fruit picking and photography

Viewpoints

panoramic

Devi Sthan Viewpoint

Views of the lake and surrounding hills.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Lake View Restaurant

4.2

Multi-cuisine • ₹300-600

Views of the lake while you dine.

Cafes

Lake Side Cafe

4.1

Specialty: Fresh Juice & Snacks

Perfect spot for evening snacks.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Mirik Market

Local market for tea and handicrafts.

Mirik TeaOrangesLocal handicrafts

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Boating

Easy

Rowboat and paddle boat rides on Sumendu Lake.

30-60 mins
₹100-300

Horse Riding

Easy

Ride around the lake on horseback.

30 mins
₹200

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Sumendu Lake boating
  • • Bokar Monastery
  • • Evening walk
Lunch, Dinner
Taxi from Siliguri
Resort
₹3,000

Activities

  • • Tea garden visit
  • • Orange orchards
  • • Depart
Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
